info.name: Personalized Silicone Weaning Set,Cartoon Weaning Set for Toddler Baby Kids,Feeding Set with Name,Eco-Friendly,Baby Plate,Baby Shower Gift

description:
DESCRIPTION
Personalized baby feeding set permanently engraved with your chosen name.

• Purchase a four-piece set: silicone dinner plate, silicone spoon, silicone fork and silicone bib.
• Material: Food grade silicone, BPA free.
• Silicone suction cup: The suction feature helps secure plates or bowls to the table or high chair tray, preventing your child from knocking them over and making mealtimes mess-free.
• Water and oil resistant, easy to clean.
• Color may vary depending on your monitor.

HOW TO ORDER
♥ Choose the color of the set
♥ Choose the engraving option you like
♥ Write down your personalized message
Font:
Symbol:
Text:
Note: If you do not choose a font we will default to F1.
If you do not choose a symbol we will default 13.
♥ Choose the required quantity
♥ Add to cart and pay

Please note:
Before placing an order, please carefully check whether your address information and personalized information are correct, we will make and deliver the goods according to your message~

Thanks for browsing!
